basic_details.job_title: RPSC Senior Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Senior Scientific Officer / Vishishth Vaigyanik Adhikari (Toxicology Division, Physics Division, Ballistics Division)
basic_details.department: State Forensic Science Laboratory (Vidhi Vigyan Prayogshala), Jaipur, Rajasthan
basic_details.total_vacancies: 03 (Provisional; subject to change as per actual requirement)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via RPSC website / SSO Portal)
basic_details.short_information: RPSC is recruiting 03 Senior Scientific Officer posts (Toxicology, Physics & Ballistics Divisions) under the Rajasthan Forensic Science Service Rules, 1979, last date 10 July 2026.

important_dates.exam_date: To be notified separately on RPSC website

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay the Ekbari Panjiyan Shulk (One-Time Registration Fee) through online mode only as per Government of Rajasthan norms. Fee once paid will NOT be refunded on any account. Registration is complete only when fee is deposited online. Blocked OTR can be unblocked on payment of Rs. 750/- and if blocked again in the same financial year, reactivation requires payment of Rs. 1500/-.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be a minimum of 21 years and maximum of 40 years as on 01-01-2027. Note: For Post S.No. 3 (Ballistics Division), the post was advertised by the Commission in the year 2019 - the age cut-off date for that post is 01-01-2020 and a 3-year additional relaxation applies, making the effective maximum age limit for that post 43 years; this relaxation applies to Posts 1 and 2 only in the year of advertisement. Maximum age indicated is for Unreserved (UR) category candidates. Relaxation in upper age limit is applicable as per Government of Rajasthan / Government of India guidelines.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of eligibility (01-01-2027). Only candidates with the specified educational qualification and experience for the respective Division are eligible. Working knowledge of Hindi written in Devnagari Script and knowledge of Rajasthan Culture is mandatory for all posts. Candidates must mandatorily complete One Time Registration (OTR) on the SSO Portal (https://sso.rajasthan.gov.in) before applying online. | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts
qualification.nationality: Indian Citizens only (domicile / eligibility as per Rajasthan State rules).

vacancy_details.Description: Blindness and Low Vision as defined under the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016
Deaf and Hard of Hearing as per RPwD Act, 2016
OA, BA, OL, BL, OAL, Cerebral Palsy, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Muscular Dystrophy, Acid Attack Victims, Spinal Deformity (SD) and Spinal Injury (SI) without associated neurological/limb dysfunction

vacancy_details.Category: Intellectual Disability / Mental Illness / SLD / Autism / Multiple Disabilities
vacancy_details.Description: I.D, M.I, S.L.D, Autism Spectrum Disorder, and Multiple Disabilities as per RPwD Act, 2016

category_wise_vacancy.Description: I.D, M.I, S.L.D, Autism Spectrum Disorder, and Multiple Disabilities as per RPwD Act, 2016

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Level L-15 (Fixed Pay as per State Government norms)

selection_process: Sl. Name of Test No. of Questions Maximum Marks Duration Medium of Test
1 Concerned Subject (as prescribed in qualifications) - for all three posts 150 150 2 Hours 30 Minutes As applicable
Selection will be based on an Online Written Examination (Objective Type). If required
Screening / Moderation process may be adopted by the Commission. Merit list will be drawn category-wise in descending order of marks. Final selection is subject to document verification
and other formalities as per rules.
The competitive examination will carry 150 marks with 150 Multiple Choice Type (objective) questions. There will be one paper only. Negative Marking: For every wrong answer

one-third (1/3rd) of the marks prescribed for that question will be deducted. OMR Answer Sheet: Candidates must darken only one circle (bubble) using BLUE BALL POINT PEN. If a candidate does not attempt a question
they must darken circle '5'. If none of the five circles is darkened

one-third (1/3rd) marks will be deducted. Extra time of 10 minutes beyond scheduled time is provided for checking darkening. A candidate who has not darkened any of the five circles in more than 10% questions shall be disqualified. The detailed syllabus will be published separately by RPSC on its official website.

Selected candidates on the merit list will be called for document verification. Candidates must produce all original certificates at the time of document verification. Appointment is subject to satisfactory verification of eligibility
and medical fitness as per state government norms
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates must first complete One Time Registration (OTR) on the SSO Portal (https://sso.rajasthan.gov.in) using Citizen Apps (G2C) → Recruitment Portal. After OTR, log in to the SSO Portal and apply using the OTR Number/Aadhaar Number. Candidates should have a valid personal email ID and mobile number which should be kept active till completion of this recruitment process. Candidates should read the detailed Instructions for Applicants on the RPSC website (https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in) before applying.
Documents Required to be Scanned and Uploaded:
Recent photograph (as per RPSC guidelines - to be captured live via webcam/mobile at the time of online application)
Left thumb impression scanned and uploaded (mandatory; also required at examination centre)
Aadhaar Card / Janadhaar Card for identity verification (mandatory before applying)
Documents to be Produced at the time of Examination / Document Verification / Appointment:
Admit Card / Call Letter (downloaded from RPSC website) along with valid photo identity proof in original
Caste Certificate in prescribed Government format (for SC/ST candidates) - issued by competent authority
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) Certificate in prescribed format issued before the last date of application (for OBC candidates)
Income and Assets Certificate (for EWS candidates) - issued in prescribed format by competent authority
Disability Certificate in prescribed format (for PwBD candidates) as per RPwD Act, 2016
Educational qualification certificates and marksheets (10th onwards, including M.Sc./M.Tech./M.E. and Computer Science qualification)
Experience Certificate in prescribed proforma (as per Annexure available in notification) - certifying at least 2 years of FSL/relevant experience after attainment of educational qualification
Last month's salary slip / proof of current employment (if applicable)
Character / Antecedent verification certificate from competent authority
Medical fitness certificate from competent authority at the time of appointment
Apply Online at: https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in | SSO Portal: https://sso.rajasthan.gov.in
For queries: Contact RPSC Helpdesk Number or E-Mail as given on Recruitment Portal; or visit RPSC office, Ajmer in person between working hours. Phone: 0145-2635212 and 2635200.
important_instructions: Candidates must complete One Time Registration (OTR) on the SSO Portal before applying; no application can be submitted without a valid OTR. The detailed advertisement and Instructions for Applicants on the RPSC website (https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in) are part of this notification - candidates must read them before applying. Candidates must apply separately for each post they wish to apply for - a separate online application must be submitted for each post. Candidates belonging to OBC Creamy Layer from Rajasthan and candidates from other states' SC/ST/OBC categories must apply as General/UR candidates. The online application must be submitted on or before 10-07-2026 (up to 12:00 midnight). No offline or physical application will be accepted under any circumstances. After submitting the online application, an Application Form Number (Application No.) will be generated - if this is not received, the application has not been successfully submitted. Candidates must ensure that all educational qualification and experience required as per this advertisement is obtained on or before the last date of online application. Online application Amendment (correction) is possible on payment of Rs. 500/- within 10 days after the last date of application, through the RPSC website; after this, no amendment will be accepted. One Time Registration (OTR) details - name, father's name, date of birth, gender - cannot be amended in the online application; any discrepancy with Aadhaar/Janadhaar must be corrected in the OTR before applying. Candidates with pending disciplinary/vigilance cases or adverse RBI/Statutory Authority observations are not eligible for appointment. PwBD candidates eligible for scribe facility: candidates with 40% or more physical disability having limitation in writing are eligible; scribe facility and compensatory time will be provided as per RPwD Act, 2016 and RPSC guidelines. Candidates must apply for scribe facility at least two days before the examination date. Mobile phones, smartwatches, or any electronic/communication devices are not allowed inside the examination hall. All revisions/corrigendum (if any) will be hosted on the RPSC website (https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in) only - candidates should visit regularly. Canvassing in any form will be a disqualification. Legal jurisdiction for any dispute arising out of this recruitment shall be Rajasthan only. RPSC reserves the right to cancel the selection process partly/entirely at any stage without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. What is the RPSC Senior Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) has announced 03 vacancies for Senior Scientific Officer posts in Toxicology, Physics, and Ballistics Divisions of the State Forensic Science Laboratory, Jaipur. Candidates can apply online from 11 June to 10 July 2026

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in RPSC SSO 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 03 vacancies are available: 1 for Toxicology Division (ST), 1 for Physics Division (UR), and 1 for Ballistics Division (OBC)

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for RPSC Senior Scientific Officer 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc./M.Tech./M.E. in relevant disciplines with at least Second Division, along with 2 years’ experience in a State or Central Government FSL. Computer Science qualification and working knowledge of Hindi & Rajasthan culture are mandatory

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to RPSC SSO 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 21 and 40 years as of 01 January 2027. Age relaxations apply for reserved categories, PwBD, ex-servicemen, and women under specific conditions

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for RPSC Senior Scientific Officer 2026?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted online only through the RPSC website or SSO Portal after completing One Time Registration (OTR). Offline applications are not accepted

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for RPSC SSO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General, OBC (Creamy Layer), and candidates from other states: ₹600. Reserved category candidates from Rajasthan & PwBD: ₹400. Fees are non-refundable and must be paid online

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for RPSC SSO 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on an Online Written Examination (objective type) followed by merit-based selection and document verification. Negative marking applies for wrong or unattempted answers

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for RPSC SSO 2026 application?
faq.answer: Candidates must upload a recent photograph, left thumb impression, Aadhaar/Janadhaar, educational qualification certificates, computer science certification, and experience certificates during online application. Originals must be produced during verification

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply under reserved categories for RPSC SSO 2026?
faq.answer: No, candidates from other states applying under SC/ST/OBC/MBC/EWS categories are treated as General/UR for fee, eligibility, and reservation purposes

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the RPSC Senior Scientific Officer 2026 official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF is available on the RPSC website: https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in and candidates should read it carefully before applying
